creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: sunpoet

Log:
  Update to 2.0.1

  - Fix RUN_DEPENDS:
    - Remove unnecessary rubygem-backports
    - Add missing rubygem-mustermann
    - Remove rubygem-rack-test
    - Fix version requirement
  - Take maintainership
